title: Common error envelope (OP_ERROR_RESPONSE payload)
description: Every OP_ERROR_RESPONSE (and every HTTP non-2xx response) carries a body conforming to this schema. The 'code' field is a stable structured identifier (see docs/error-codes.md). The 'path' field is an optional JSON path or DAG path locating the offending element. The 'message' field is human-readable; per Phase 12.7 D-02 forward-looking framing applies — messages say 'X is not supported in v0' rather than 'X has been removed'.

code.description: Structured error code; see docs/error-codes.md for the alphabetised list.

path.description: JSON path or DAG path locating the offending element (e.g., 'descriptors[1].schema.amount', 'fields.amount', 'requests[2].table').

message.description: Human-readable error message (forward-looking framing per Phase 12.7 D-02).
